item.title: Version 1.2.2
item.description:
Changed

• Onboarding tour is shorter and snappier — five focused steps instead of ten.

Fixed

• OCR language picker no longer defaults to Chinese — the common languages (English, French, German, …) now appear correctly, with English selected by default.
• OCR no longer creates duplicate `_ocr.pdf` files for PDFs that already contain selectable text; it tells you they're already searchable instead.
• Toolbar Compress / OCR / Title Manager buttons always show a tooltip and now guide you with a hint when nothing is selected, instead of silently greying out.
• Tabs and the tab close button now have tooltips.
• Settings → License now clearly distinguishes Free trial (with days left), a paid License, and the always-free core tier.

Added

• The in-app updater now shows release notes for each update.
